faqLink.title: Looking for Quick Answers?
faqLink.subtitle: Check out our FAQ section for instant answers to common questions

q1.question: How does Multifagro work?
q1.answer: Simply fill out our quick form with your moving details. You'll receive multiple quotes from verified movers within minutes. Compare prices, read reviews, and book directly through our platform. It's that easy!

q2.question: Are the movers insured?
q2.answer: Yes! All moving companies on our platform are fully licensed, insured, and background-checked. We only work with professional movers who meet our strict quality standards.

q3.question: How much does a move cost?
q3.answer: Moving costs vary based on distance, volume, and services needed. Our platform shows transparent pricing from multiple movers so you can compare and choose the best option for your budget. Most local moves range from CHF 300-1,000.

q4.question: Can I get help with packing?
q4.answer: Absolutely! Many of our partner movers offer professional packing services. You can add packing, unpacking, and packing materials when requesting your quote.

q5.question: What if something gets damaged?
q5.answer: All our movers carry comprehensive insurance. In the rare event of damage, you're fully covered. Simply file a claim through our platform and we'll help facilitate the process.

q6.question: How far in advance should I book?
q6.answer: We recommend booking 2-4 weeks in advance, especially during peak moving season (summer months). However, many movers can accommodate last-minute moves within 48 hours.

q7.question: Do you serve my area?
q7.answer: We currently serve all major cities in Switzerland including Zurich, Geneva, Basel, Bern, Lausanne, and Lucerne. Enter your postcodes to see available movers in your area.

q8.question: Can I reschedule my move?
q8.answer: Yes, most movers allow rescheduling with adequate notice (usually 48-72 hours). Cancellation policies vary by mover, so check the terms when booking.

factors.title: What Affects Moving Costs?
factors.subtitle: Several factors influence the final price of your move

distance.title: Distance
distance.description: Local moves within the same city are typically less expensive than long-distance relocations.

volume.title: Volume
volume.description: The amount of items and furniture directly affects the truck size and crew needed.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Stairs, elevators, and parking availability can impact the moving time and cost.

services.title: Services
services.description: Additional services like packing, unpacking, and storage add to the total cost.

timing.title: Timing
timing.description: Peak season (summer) and weekend moves may have higher rates than off-peak times.

estimates.title: Estimated Price Ranges
estimates.subtitle: Get an idea of what your move might cost (prices vary by specific details)
estimates.disclaimer: * Prices are estimates and may vary based on specific requirements, distance, and additional services. Get an accurate quote by filling out our form.

cta.title: Ready for Your Exact Quote?

hero.title: Making Moving Simple
hero.subtitle: We're on a mission to transform the moving experience by connecting customers with trusted, professional movers across Switzerland.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Multifagro was born from a simple observation: moving shouldn't be stressful. After experiencing the challenges of coordinating moves firsthand, our founders realized there had to be a better way.
story.paragraph2: We built Multifagro to be the trusted platform that brings transparency, choice, and peace of mind to every move. By carefully vetting our partners and providing instant quotes, we've helped thousands of families and businesses relocate with confidence.
story.paragraph3: Today, we're proud to be Switzerland's leading moving marketplace, connecting customers with the best professional movers in the industry. But we're just getting started.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To make every move simple, transparent, and stress-free by connecting people with trusted professionals and innovative tools that streamline the entire relocation process.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: These principles guide everything we do
